full_text:
Liu Ji (Jingyu) 劉基 (敬輿)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Ji (劉基), styledJingyu (敬輿), was born in Donglai. Favoured in court by Sun Quan. Stopped a drunken Quan from executing Yu Fan. Liu Ji was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Liu Ji lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
